evidence-binding: n1 c1ed707769fc
RED: D419-INV7 (live node count (3) must not exceed max_concurrent=2) — AssertionError: reconcile-running-set rolled forward all 3 nodes despite ceiling=2 (budget=ceiling-live=2-1=1), pre-impl; D419-CLOSE-FIELDSURVIVAL (max_concurrent=3 preserved in empty-set fallback, extra_field preserved in empty-set fallback) — 2 AssertionErrors: runCloseNode's empty-set fallback wrote { state:'open', nodes:[] } dropping unknown top-level fields, pre-impl. 3 failures, 500 passed before fix.
GREEN: D419-INV2 passes (open-next never writes running-set.json — invariant confirmed); D419-INV7 passes (reconcile-running-set caps roll-forward at budget=1, only 1 of 2 eligible nodes rolled forward, total <= max_concurrent=2); D419-CLOSE-FIELDSURVIVAL passes (max_concurrent+extra_field survive empty-set fallback). 503/503 assertions green after fix.

Changes made (×4 editions in lockstep):
- runOpenReady: added max_concurrent = min(cap, --max || cap) to openingSet (Phase 1) and spread openingSet into finalSet (Phase 3)
- runCloseAndOpenNext + runCloseNode: fixed bare { state:'open', nodes:[] } fallback to { ...running, state:'open', nodes:[] }
- runReconcileRunningSet: added cap enforcement (ceiling=max_concurrent||1, budget=ceiling-liveStable, kept=keptAll.slice(0,budget), cappedOut dropped+baselines dropped); empty-set fallback also spread to { ...running, state:'open', nodes:[] }
- scripts/test-adaptive-node.js: added D419-INV2, D419-INV7, D419-CLOSE-FIELDSURVIVAL test blocks
All four edition walkthrough simulations and test:kaola-workflow:{claude,codex,gitlab,gitea} chains pass.
